text: Legal protection for investors has always been an important aspect of the capital market and shall always remain so. Based on the development of the supervision function in the financial services industry from being implemented by Bapepam-LK (Financial Services Authority) to be transferred to the OJK, it can be seen clearly that Bapepam-LK as a regulatory body which was controlled by the Ministry of Finance in which the Minister acted as a supervisor. However, the OJK works independently in which the accountability done by OJK towards the parliament of the Republic of Indonesia and the people. One of the reasons from the establishment of the OJK is to improve the protection of consumers of the financial services. Thus, the purpose of this research is to know the legal protection of the capital market and the parties that gain the legal protection through Law No. 8 of 1995 on Capital Market and Law No. 21 of 2011 on the Financial Services Authority.
